confidence_formula_plain_text: confidence_percent = 100 * sum(weight_i for VERIFIED_ACTIVE) / sum(target_weight_i for all listed sources); CANDIDATE_UNVERIFIED contributes 0 to numerator
configuration_default: 2019 F-450 Regular Cab 145.3in WB 60in CA 4x2 DRW

front_axle_layout.evidence_level_note: Active verified sources are dealer/auction visual (Level D). OEM workshop source remains CANDIDATE_UNVERIFIED so it does not raise evidence_level to A yet.

front_axle_layout.reviewer_notes: The architecture of the 4x2 wide-track monobeam is visually verified by walkarounds and dealer inventory, but the specific workshop repair schematics remain unverified candidates until primary file audit.

rear_frame_rail_width.evidence_level_note: No VERIFIED_ACTIVE sources; evidence_level unset until BBAS PDF is hashed and inspected.

rear_frame_rail_width.reviewer_notes: Value is highly probable given historical chassis-cab standards. However, actual drawing measurement bounds must be verified against an acquired PDF. Do not insert 34.2 in as ENGINEERING VERIFIED frame geometry.
